summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Doodle Wall application. Backend APIs working correctly with 83.3% success rate. Frontend fully functional with all core features working including drawing, submission, pan/zoom, and doodle enlargement.

validation_bugs.issue: Accepts invalid base64 image data without validation
validation_bugs.impact: Should return 422 validation error but returns 200 and creates doodle

ui_bugs.issue: Reset view button blocked by Emergent badge overlay

passed_tests: API root endpoint responds correctly
GET /api/doodles returns doodles list
POST /api/doodles creates doodles with grid positioning
GET /api/doodles/{id} retrieves specific doodles
GET /api/doodles/stats/count returns accurate count
404 handling for non-existent doodles
Page loads with correct title and doodle count
Doodles display on wall with proper positioning and rotation
Add Doodle button opens drawing modal
350x350 canvas allows drawing with mouse
8 color picker buttons work and change drawing color
Clear button clears the canvas
Put on Wall button saves doodle to backend
New doodle appears on wall after submission
Doodle count updates after adding doodle
Pan/zoom controls (zoom in, zoom out) work
Clicking doodle opens enlarged view modal
Enlarged modal shows image and timestamp
Modal closing works (X button and overlay click)
Pan functionality works with mouse drag
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix input validation for image_data field in POST /api/doodles endpoint to reject invalid base64 data. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning to prevent Emergent badge from blocking UI elements.
